notes: Live capture for `tagsAdd` on harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com compares the mutation payload plus the delayed downstream tag-filtered read after Shopify's search index converges. The staged runtime exposes effective local tags to `product.tags`, `products(query: "tag:...")`, and `productsCount(query: "tag:...")` immediately, so Rust integration tests cover the draft read-after-write timing while this parity target covers the index-converged Shopify payload/cursor/pageInfo contract.

expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns opaque search connection cursors; the proxy uses deterministic Product GID cursors for staged local state.
